training_status: athletic, uses peptides for performance on busy/active days

compounds.frequency: up to 3 days per week, as needed

benefits.description: Notices energy effect within first hour after injecting, effects ebb and flow all day

side_effects.description: Lump/bump under skin lasting a few days at subcutaneous injection site; considering switching to IM to avoid this

protocol_notes: Uses Mots-c as needed for busiest days or athletic performance, at most 3 days per week. Does not feel need to cycle off as long as taking days off. Reports SS-31 enhances Mots-c effects.
